notes.body: 55% to Stay Alive — 2065 COGS+Labor combined ran over the 55% goal last week. Bobby sent his plan 9:38 PM; Brad acknowledged and is 'looking forward to celebrating the positive impact.' Execution mode: run the labor tracker daily, work high-labor days, hold combined under 55%. 7/22 labor hit 17.27%.

Incident Process PDRs — complete PDRs for the ENTIRE Shift Lead team on the incident-report process (first-aid kit location, when to fill, where to send), following the L2 (guest's daughter burned). Bobby replied 9:27 PM; finish the PDRs and copy Brad on documentation.

Another scam call hit Muncie — caller posed as corporate asking for the GM's name and a shipping address. No one gives login/account info, cash, or addresses over the phone. Post the email at the register; call GM/DM/Brad on any such request.

New shop scored 95% (names unavailable — pull from CT). Store: month 66.8% (4 shops), YTD 83.5% (41). 7/11 Dinner scored 0% (Jeremiah, Madison, Richard) — coaching priority. 2065 last in district on shops per Brad — Halo Effect push.
Wed 7/22: Closing Checklist MISSED and Milkshake Pump Cleaning Check MISSED — both on Madison Cureton's PM shift. AM (Bobby) clean. Coach Madison; get the milkshake pump cleaned today.
